text: Cell viability was assessed using the Cell Counting Kit (XX, XX). Cells were seeded into 96-well plates at a density of 5,000 cells per well, with each group plated in triplicate. After the specified treatments, CCK-8 solution was added to each well, followed by incubation at 37°C for two hours. Absorbance was measured at 450 nm using a microplate reader (Thermo Scientific, USA).
